    A

    accountExists(String) - Static method in class SaveData
    Checks whether an account file exists for the specified username.
    addEntry(MediaEntry) - Method in class Library
    Adds a media entry to the library.
    Album - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents an album entry in the media library.
    Album(String, Status, int, String, String) - Constructor for class Album
    Constructor for the Album class.
    Anime - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents an anime entry in the media library.
    Anime(String, Status, int, String, int) - Constructor for class Anime
    Constructor for the Anime class.

    C

    COMPLETED - Enum constant in enum class Status
     
    createEntry(int, Library) - Method in class MediaInput
    Creates a new media entry based on the user's selected media type.

    D

    displayEntries() - Method in class Library
    Displays all media entries stored in the library.
    displayEntriesByMediaType(String) - Method in class Library
    Displays all media entries of the specified media type.
    displayEntriesByStatus(Status) - Method in class Library
    Displays all media entries with the specified status.
    displaySummary() - Method in class Library
    Displays a summary of the library which includes the total number of entries, number of planned, in-progress, and completed entries, and the user's average rating of completed entries

    E

    editEntry(MediaEntry, Library) - Method in class MediaInput
    Allows the user to edit the attributes of an existing media entry.

    G

    getArtist() - Method in class Album
    Returns the artist of the album.
    getDisplayRating() - Method in class MediaEntry
    Returns a formatted rating for display.
    getDisplayReview() - Method in class MediaEntry
    Returns a formatted review for display.
    getDuration() - Method in class Movie
    Returns the duration of the movie.
    getEntry(String) - Method in class Library
    Searches for a media entry by its title.
    getLibrary() - Method in class User
    Retrieves the user's library of media entries
    getMediaType() - Method in class Album
    Returns the media type.
    getMediaType() - Method in class Anime
    Returns the media type of this entry.
    getMediaType() - Method in class MediaEntry
    Returns the specific media type.
    getMediaType() - Method in class Movie
    Returns the media type of this entry.
    getNumEps() - Method in class Anime
    Returns the number of episodes.
    getPassword() - Method in class User
    Retrieves the password of the user's account
    getRating() - Method in class MediaEntry
    Returns the stored numeric rating.
    getReview() - Method in class MediaEntry
    Returns the review.
    getStatus() - Method in class MediaEntry
    Returns the current status.
    getTitle() - Method in class MediaEntry
    Returns the title.
    getUsername() - Method in class User
    Retrieves the username of the user's account
    getValidInput(Scanner, int, int) - Static method in class InputChecker
    Prompts the user until a valid integer within the specified range is entered.

    H

    handleAuthentication(Scanner) - Method in class UserInput
    Prompts the user to either log in to an existing account or create a new account until authentication is successful.

    InputChecker - Class in Unnamed Package
    Provides utility methods for validating user input.

    Represents a user's media library that stores and manages media entries.

    Loads a user's account from a serialized file.

    R

    removeEntry(MediaEntry) - Method in class Library
    Removes a media entry from the library.

    saveAccount(User) - Static method in class SaveData
    Saves a user's account data to a serialized file.

    Provides utility methods for saving and loading the user's account data.
